revision.comment: per edit request on talk page
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from subtopic |name=From a subtopic |from=a subtopic of the target article |info=** If the redirected subtopic could potentially have [[Wikipedia:Notability|its own article]] in the future, then also tag the redirect with {{tl|R with possibilities}} and {{tl|R printworthy}}. |main category=Redirects from subtopics }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from subtopic |name=From a subtopic |from=a subtopic of the target article |info=** If the redirected subtopic could potentially have [[Wikipedia:Notability|its own article]] in the future, then also tag the redirect with {{tl|R with possibilities}} and {{tl|R printworthy}}. |main category=Redirects from subtopics }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from subtopic |name=From a subtopic |from=a subtopic of the target article or section |info=** If the redirected subtopic could potentially have [[Wikipedia:Notability|its own article]] in the future, then also tag the redirect with {{tl|R with possibilities}} and {{tl|R printworthy}}. |main category=Redirects from subtopics }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
